title: Minimoriya Pack
description: A small modpack that consists of a selection of my mods, plus some performance mods
body:
# Minimoriya Pack
Intended to be mostly vanilla plus, this is a small collection of some my own mods plus a couple performance mods.

Primary features:
* [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement), which completely overhauls enchanting and a lot of various game mechanics.
* [Hearty Meals](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearty-meals), which removes hunger and causes food to heal you directly instead.
* [Anthropophagy](https://modrinth.com/mod/anthropophagy). which adds a (dubious) alternative source of food.
* [Inferno](https://modrinth.com/mod/inferno), which rekindles features related to fire.
* [Nycto](https://modrinth.com/mod/nycto), which adds vampires (and later werewolves), and allows you turn into or hunt them.
* [Respawnable Pets](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawnable-pets), which adds a way to make pets a more permanent addition to your playthrough.
* [Superb Steeds](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-steeds), which makes horses a more viable and fun form of transportation.
